resources.string: Describe what happened and what you expected instead

Your description and the device information shown below will be posted to the private Numo support workspace. The report uses a fresh temporary identity and is not linked to your wallet or app identity. The relay and network providers may observe your IP address and submission time.
The report was not accepted. Your text is still here; you can retry.
The description is too long. Maximum: 8,000 UTF-8 bytes.
Check the report information and try again.

Enabled by default. If the app terminates unexpectedly, it sends a report to the private Numo support workspace after the next launch containing the error category and app code locations. Exception messages, raw logs, wallet data, and identifiers are never included. Turn this off at any time.
Send an anonymous report to Numo support
